ranges.notes: Cold winter weather with temperatures often below freezing; quiet tourist season but local holiday on January 6th; low crowds; limited outdoor activities.
Still cold and snowy, with temperatures often below freezing; indoor cultural attractions like museums and theaters are good options; low tourist activity.
Winter continues with cold temperatures and occasional snow; ideal for travelers who enjoy quiet city exploration and winter sports nearby; very few tourists.
Still cold and snowy with average temperatures around -2°C to 1°C; low tourist presence; good for budget travelers and those interested in winter sports in the region.
Carnival season with some local festivities bringing liveliness to the city; weather still cold but slightly improving; moderate crowds during events.
End of winter with gradual warming; some snow may remain; fewer tourists and good prices; good for cultural visits and local dining experiences.
Early spring with temperatures starting to rise (around 5-10°C); some rainy days; low tourist crowds; good time for museum visits and city walks without peak season noise.

ranges.event: Easter Preparations (late March or early April)
ranges.notes: Local Easter markets and cultural events begin; pleasant spring weather; moderate crowds during Easter-related events.
Spring in full swing with mild temperatures and blooming parks; ideal for outdoor sightseeing; pleasant weather attracts more visitors but still manageable crowds.
Easter is a major spring event with traditional markets and church services; weather is mild (10-15°C) with occasional showers; moderate to high crowds around Easter.
Spring weather is pleasant and parks are lush; ideal for walking tours, outdoor cafes, and visiting historical sites; typically fewer tourists than summer.
Labour Day is a public holiday with local celebrations; spring is at its peak with warm temperatures (15-20°C); increasing tourist interest but manageable crowds.
May is one of the best months to visit Kosice with warm, pleasant weather and blossoming gardens; ideal for outdoor activities and festivals; tourist crowds start to grow but are not overwhelming.
June offers warm weather (18-24°C) and the start of cultural festivals including music events; ideal for outdoor dining and sightseeing; increasing tourist numbers but still comfortable.
Warm and sunny days with long daylight hours; perfect for exploring city parks, outdoor festivals, and terrace cafes; tourist season is well underway but not at peak yet.
Peak summer with warm to hot weather (20-27°C); high tourist volumes; city can be crowded but lively; ideal for festivals but prices are higher and accommodations fill quickly.

ranges.event: Kosice City Days Festival (early to mid July)
ranges.notes: The city festival brings cultural events, concerts and increased visitor numbers; warm weather with occasional thunderstorms; vibrant atmosphere but crowded and pricier.
Warm summer continues with temperatures around 20-26°C; crowds remain high due to summer holidays; good time for outdoor events and sightseeing but expect busy streets and higher prices.
Religious holiday with some local festivities; hot weather with occasional thunderstorms; some tourists depart as summer holiday winds down; moderately high crowds.
Early autumn with pleasant weather (15-20°C) and fewer tourists; ideal for visiting museums, cafes, and walking tours; city is calm and prices drop compared to summer.

ranges.event: Košice Peace Marathon (usually second Sunday of October but sometimes events start in late September)
ranges.notes: Running events and related activities start to appear; mild, comfortable weather; moderate crowds with active cultural calendar.
Major international marathon event attracting visitors; crisp autumn weather around 10-15°C; colorful foliage adds charm; moderate to high crowds during marathon activities.
Cooler autumn weather with average 8-12°C; fewer tourists as high season ends; some rain possible; indoor cultural venues are a good option.
Late autumn with chilly, damp weather and short daylight hours; low tourist activity; some cultural events but many attractions close earlier; budget-friendly period.
Cold and often rainy or snowy; few tourists; good for budget travelers and business visitors; limited outdoor activity possibilities.
Early December is cold with festive preparations; Christmas markets start to appear; moderate crowds mainly on weekends; weather cold with possible snow.
Christmas markets create a festive atmosphere with crafts, food, and music; cold weather with snow likely; increasing tourist numbers but still manageable; excellent for cultural experiences.
Major holidays with local celebrations; cold and snowy; some attractions closed on Dec 25 and 26; New Year's Eve parties in the city; moderate to high crowds around celebrations.
